title: Ethereum is still a good long-term buy, according data: Analyst
summary: Ethereum’s dominance in DeFi, stablecoins and staking is strengthening the long-term ETH accumulation thesis, despite it’s 28% price decline in 2026.

title: Bitcoin 'Pizza Day' was 16 years ago, here's how much that BTC is worth today
summary: Laszlo Hanyecz's 2010 post, offering 10,000 BTC in exchange for two pizzas delivered to his home, marked the first recorded commercial BTC payment.

title: India Raises Diesel, Gasoline Prices for Third Time in Eight Days
summary: India’s state-run refiners raised retail prices again of diesel and gasoline on Saturday to help processors cut losses on discounted sales and to control a spike in demand.

title: Abrego Garcia Wins Dismissal of US Human-Smuggling Case
summary: A federal judge in Tennessee dismissed human-smuggling charges against Salvadoran migrant Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia after concluding the US government brought the case in retaliation for his legal fight against being deported.

title: New strategic bitcoin reserve bill drops 1 million BTC purchase target, adds 20-year lockup period
